content-plan-root.description: High level content plan for future game entities and progression beats.

plan-a50e3310-3c77-4fba-91d8-04092551db6.description: Specializes on buff effects and passive targeting at closest enemy. Has fungi, plants and animals.

plan-07e71a41-6a51-4d80-98b5-b9036ad934c.description: Poisonous fungi. Provide wall clusters and tower bases with DOT.

plan-4cc5403e-abcb-45b0-ae5a-9e3924e8131.description: Freshly mutated from base mycelium. Gives access to poisonous cluster. Slighlty decreases adjanced animal production.

plan-909d41f2-e5f2-4414-a5b2-84066b5c901.description: Stronger and more mature. Help nearby fungi. Affect badly nearby animals.

plan-c9047893-e2de-42a7-a1da-458d0ada409.description: Not just poisonous but acidious. Affect badly animals, slightly supress threes. Allows to build fungi tower base.

plan-7730b53d-46eb-4484-9162-5fde5ccf23c.description: Extremely deadly fungi growth. supress nearby animals, threes, people. Allows to pass on the legacy.
